completion_promises.evidence: Authored src/forge/pipeline/cli_steering.py exporting CliSteeringHandler (dataclass) plus the seven Protocol seams it composes over (BuildSnapshotReader, PauseRejectResolver, AsyncTaskCanceller, AsyncTaskUpdater, BuildCanceller, StageSkipRecorder, BuildResumer). TestHandlerExists.test_handler_class_lives_at_pipeline_cli_steering verifies importability from the canonical module path.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Method handle_cancel(build_id) -> CancelOutcome with three branches: paused-at-flagged-checkpoint resolves as synthetic reject -> CANCELLED; in-autobuild calls cancel_async_task and marks CANCELLED with no PR-creation; any other non-terminal state transitions to CANCELLED and refuses further dispatch
completion_promises.evidence: CliSteeringHandler.handle_cancel branches on the snapshot's BuildLifecycle. PAUSED_AT_GATE -> calls pause_reject_resolver.resolve_as_reject + build_canceller.mark_cancelled (returns CANCELLED_VIA_PAUSE_REJECT, citing FEAT-FORGE-004 ASSUM-005 in the rationale template). AUTOBUILD_RUNNING -> calls async_task_canceller.cancel_async_task(task_id) + build_canceller.mark_cancelled with rationale stating no PR-creation attempted (returns CANCELLED_VIA_AUTOBUILD). OTHER_RUNNING -> mark_cancelled directly (returns CANCELLED_DIRECT). TERMINAL -> no-op. Validated by TestHandleCancelPausePath (5 tests), TestHandleCancelAutobuildPath (5 tests), TestHandleCancelDirectPath (4 tests), TestHandleCancelTerminalNoop (3 tests).

completion_promises.criterion_text: Method handle_skip(build_id, stage) -> SkipOutcome: calls ConstitutionalGuard.veto_skip(stage); if refused records SKIP_REFUSED_CONSTITUTIONAL rationale and leaves build paused; otherwise records the stage as SKIPPED and resumes at next stage
completion_promises.evidence: CliSteeringHandler.handle_skip always defers to constitutional_guard.veto_skip(stage). On SkipVerdict.REFUSED_CONSTITUTIONAL it records via skip_recorder.record_skip_refused with the SKIP_REFUSED_RATIONALE template (citing ADR-ARCH-026 + the guard's own rationale) and returns SkipStatus.REFUSED_CONSTITUTIONAL without resuming the build. On allowed it calls skip_recorder.record_skipped + build_resumer.resume_after_skip and returns SkipStatus.SKIPPED. Validated by TestHandleSkipRefused (5 tests) and TestHandleSkipPermitted (6 tests).

completion_promises.criterion_text: Method handle_directive(build_id, feature_id, directive_text): for active autobuild calls update_async_task to append to AutobuildState.pending_directives; returns immediately; autobuild itself decides when to honour
completion_promises.evidence: CliSteeringHandler.handle_directive looks up the live autobuild task_id via _active_autobuild_task_id_for_feature (matches snapshot.lifecycle == AUTOBUILD_RUNNING AND active_autobuild_feature_id == requested feature_id). When found it calls async_task_updater.update_async_task(task_id, append_pending_directive=directive_text) and returns DirectiveStatus.QUEUED synchronously. When no live autobuild matches it returns DirectiveStatus.NO_ACTIVE_AUTOBUILD with no side effects. The autobuild itself owns when to drain pending_directives. Validated by TestHandleDirectiveQueued (4 tests) and TestHandleDirectiveNoAutobuild (4 tests).

completion_promises.criterion_text: Cancel during pause: pause resolves as synthetic reject (Group D)
completion_promises.evidence: TestHandleCancelPausePath.test_handle_cancel_during_pause_resolves_pause_as_reject and ...marks_build_cancelled assert resolve_as_reject is invoked with the paused stage + feature_id and the rationale cites FEAT-FORGE-004 ASSUM-005. CANCEL_REJECT_RATIONALE template names the synthetic-reject pathway explicitly.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Skip on non-constitutional stage: stage recorded as skipped, chain resumes (Group D)
completion_promises.evidence: TestHandleSkipPermitted.test_handle_skip_on_non_constitutional_stage_records_skipped and ...resumes_build assert that for SYSTEM_DESIGN the recorder's skipped list grows by 1 and build_resumer.resume_after_skip is invoked with the build_id + skipped_stage. Reinforced by test_handle_skip_with_negative_control_guard_permits_pr_review which uses an empty-set ConstitutionalGuard to confirm the handler defers permit/refuse to the guard rather than hard-coding the constitutional set.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Skip on PR-review: refused, build remains paused, refusal recorded (Group C @regression)
completion_promises.evidence: TestHandleSkipRefused asserts: (a) handle_skip on PULL_REQUEST_REVIEW returns SkipStatus.REFUSED_CONSTITUTIONAL; (b) skip_recorder.record_skip_refused is called and skip_recorder.skipped is empty; (c) build_resumer.resumed is empty (build remains paused); (d) the outcome carries the SkipDecision with verdict=REFUSED_CONSTITUTIONAL; (e) the recorded rationale matches SKIP_REFUSED_RATIONALE and quotes the guard's ADR-ARCH-026 rationale verbatim.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Unit tests cover all three methods with mocked supervisor + state channel + constitutional guard
completion_promises.evidence: tests/forge/test_cli_steering.py contains 45 unit tests across 9 test classes. The supervisor pause-resolution surface, FEAT-FORGE-001 build-state writer, FEAT-FORGE-001 stage_log skip/refuse writer, and supervisor resume hook are mocked via FakePauseRejectResolver, FakeBuildCanceller, FakeStageSkipRecorder, and FakeBuildResumer. The DeepAgents async_tasks state channel is mocked via FakeSnapshotReader (read), FakeAsyncTaskCanceller (cancel_async_task), and FakeAsyncTaskUpdater (update_async_task). The constitutional guard is exercised both with the canonical CONSTITUTIONAL_STAGES set and with an empty-set negative-control instance.

completion_promises.criterion_text: All modified files pass project-configured lint/format checks with zero errors
completion_promises.evidence: Both files parse cleanly under Python's ast module. awk scan for lines > 88 chars (the project's Black line-length config from .claude/rules/code-style.md) returned zero matches across both files. No new dependencies were added. The full forge test suite (1172 tests across tests/forge/ excluding tests/forge/dispatch which is a separate non-package directory) passes with only pre-existing PytestUnknownMarkWarning warnings unrelated to this change.
